title: Account Executive
skillSummary: Financial accounting, bookkeeping, GST/TDS compliance, payroll management, Excel and Tally/ERP.
details: Handle accounting entries, reconciliations, tax data and monthly reports.

title: Web Developer
skillSummary: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap, REST APIs and responsive UI.
details: Implement storefront features and optimize user experience across devices.

title: HR Executive
skillSummary: Recruitment operations, onboarding process, policy communication and HR documentation.
details: Support talent acquisition and employee lifecycle management.

title: Admin Executive
skillSummary: Facility handling, vendor coordination, office process control and reporting.
details: Manage day to day office operations and cross-team admin support.

title: Graphics Designer
skillSummary: Brand creatives, campaign banners, social media assets and design tools.
details: Build visual assets for ecommerce pages and marketing campaigns.

title: Frontdesk Executive
skillSummary: Reception handling, call management, visitor coordination and communication skills.
details: Manage front desk workflows and professional visitor interactions.

title: BD Executive
skillSummary: Lead generation, client communication, proposal handling and pipeline tracking.
details: Expand business opportunities through proactive outreach and relationship management.

title: Sales Manager
skillSummary: Sales target planning, team leadership, forecasting and strategic channel growth.
details: Drive revenue and manage sales execution performance.

title: Marketing Executive
skillSummary: Campaign execution, channel analytics, social media and demand generation.
details: Plan and execute digital marketing initiatives for brand growth.
